description_long: This is a large, rectangular warehouse building with a flat roof and a predominantly white and light gray exterior. The facade features a regular grid of small, evenly spaced windows along the upper portion of the walls, providing natural light to the interior. The structure includes a main entry area, several smaller rooms or offices along one side, and a large open storage or work area occupying most of the interior. A loading dock with a ramp and a small vehicle is visible, indicating logistical functionality. The roof is flat and unadorned, with no visible skylights or rooftop equipment, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and purpose-built for industrial or storage use.
description: A large, flat-roofed warehouse with a white and gray exterior, grid-like windows, and a visible loading dock. The structure is modern and utilitarian, designed for storage and logistics.
description_view_0: This view shows the main facade with a grid of windows, the main entry area, and a small vehicle near the loading dock.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the open interior space, the loading dock ramp, and the arrangement of smaller rooms along one side.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the side with multiple smaller rooms or offices and the continuation of the window grid pattern.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the rear and side of the building, with the loading dock and vehicle visible, and the flat expanse of the roof.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features a repetitive grid of small, rectangular windows set into a smooth, white exterior wall. Entryways and loading dock access are integrated with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over ornamentation.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat and expansive, constructed from concrete or similar material, with no visible skylights, HVAC units, or other rooftop features.
